training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: priming on pump

### TOPIC
pump priming

### COMPONENT
pump

### OPERATION
priming

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- pump
- priming

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the pump, conduit of the Omnissiah's will.
First: Invoke the Machine Spirit of the pump with sacred incantations and holy oils.
Second: Execute the priming sequence upon the pump, expelling corrupted fluids with righteous pressure.
Third: Verify the pump's blessed circulation, ensuring the priming holds steadfast against entropy's decay.
Fourth: Anoint the pump once more in gratitude to the Machine Spirits above.
